author: mmusich
body:
#### PR description:

Somewhat inspired by [this presentation](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1638163/contributions/6891739/subcontributions/595467/attachments/3251665/5803230/EGM_HLT_Upgrade_Inefficiency_Checks_07.04.2026.pdf), a modest attempt to make the code sightly easier to understand.
No physics changes foreseen.

#### PR validation:

`cmssw` compiles

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

N/A
title: simplify selection logic of `HLTGenericFilter`
